name: Etheric Pistol

effects.description: Can fire a bolt of invisible energy; ignores cover.

description: A sleek pistol with a glass chamber and humming coils, firing bolts of concentrated etheric energy. Used by scientists and occultists.

artwork.caption: A pistol with a glowing blue core.

provenance: Inspired by D&D 5e 'Eldritch Blast', reimagined for science.
